args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Checklist for executing the approved implementation plan."}
args.CodeContent:
"- [ ] Alter MySQL table `assessment_types` on production VPS to add `showInReport` column
- [ ] Modify `server/models/AssessmentType.js` to include the `showInReport` field
- [ ] Modify `server/controllers/assessmentController.js` to handle `showInReport`
- [ ] Update `server/services/metricsService.js` to respect `showInReport` in metrics computation
- [ ] Modify `src/pages/PrincipalAdmin.jsx` - TestTypesView and TestTypeModal to support editing and viewing `showInReport`
- [ ] Implement Academic Reports section in `src/pages/PrincipalAdmin.jsx` (ReportsView)
- [ ] Verify changes locally and deploy/test
"
args.Description: "Create task list for the execution phase"
